record.field:
version: '3' services: db: image: postgres:15 environment: - POSTGRES_PASSWORD=odoo - POSTGRES_USER=odoo - POSTGRES_DB=postgres restart: always volumes: - ./postgresql:/var/lib/postgresql/data
odoo: image: odoo:17.0 depends_on: - db tty: true command: -- environment: - HOST=db - USER=odoo - PASSWORD=odoo volumes: - ./addons:/mnt/extra-addons - ./etc:/etc/odoo - ./data:/var/lib/odoo restart: always
nginx: image: nginx:alpine depends_on: - odoo ports: - "{{HTTP-PORT}}:80" volumes: - ./nginx.conf:/etc/nginx/nginx.conf:ro restart: always

version: '3' services: db: image: postgres:15 environment: - POSTGRES_PASSWORD=odoo - POSTGRES_USER=odoo - POSTGRES_DB=postgres restart: always volumes: - ./postgresql:/var/lib/postgresql/data
odoo: image: odoo:18.0 depends_on: - db tty: true command: -- environment: - HOST=db - USER=odoo - PASSWORD=odoo volumes: - ./addons:/mnt/extra-addons - ./etc:/etc/odoo - ./data:/var/lib/odoo restart: always
nginx: image: nginx:alpine depends_on: - odoo ports: - "{{HTTP-PORT}}:80" volumes: - ./nginx.conf:/etc/nginx/nginx.conf:ro restart: always

version: '3' services: db: image: postgres:15 environment: - POSTGRES_PASSWORD=odoo - POSTGRES_USER=odoo - POSTGRES_DB=postgres restart: always volumes: - ./postgresql:/var/lib/postgresql/data
odoo: image: odoo:19.0 depends_on: - db tty: true command: -- environment: - HOST=db - USER=odoo - PASSWORD=odoo volumes: - ./addons:/mnt/extra-addons - ./etc:/etc/odoo - ./data:/var/lib/odoo restart: always
nginx: image: nginx:alpine depends_on: - odoo ports: - "{{HTTP-PORT}}:80" volumes: - ./nginx.conf:/etc/nginx/nginx.conf:ro restart: always
